title: ModChecker
description: A Mod which checks if a Player has an unallowed Mod installed
body:
# ModChecker ![Static Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/MC-1.20.x|1.21.x-green) ![Modrinth Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/qQjdBu4k?logo=Modrinth&style=flat-square) [![forthebadge](https://forthebadge.com/images/badges/works-on-my-machine.svg)](https://forthebadge.com)


Please join the Discord if you have questions!

This Mod is just checks if your installed Mods check with the allowed [List](https://github.com/TubYoub/ModChecker/blob/master/allowed_mods.json) on Github. ## Features

### **This mod doesnt share which mods you are using, with the Server owner, just that their are unexpected ones found.**

The Mod fetches a json file, from the [repo](https://github.com/TubYoub/ModChecker), which contains a [list](https://github.com/TubYoub/ModChecker/blob/master/allowed_mods.json) of the allowed Mods. If there is no mod found which is disallowed it will change the Client name which the server Owner can see if he wants to. Normal Client Name: ModChecker-fabric v1.2 (No unexpected mods detected) Unexpected Mods found: ModChecker-fabric v1.2 (unexpected mods detected) ## Add further Mods to the list If you want me too add more Mods to the allowed List open a Issue in the Repo or open a Pull request with the changes ___ I know that this mod is easy to circumvent but its just a little something cause i dont trust my friends.
